title: Tau 1 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 1 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Each year mokopuna will be building on their learning. Here is some helpful information to support their learning in Te Reo Rangatira and Pāngarau.
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 0 to 8
- Ono marama – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
- Tau 1 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa Pāngarau – Tau 1 Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 1 Practising sounds and letters – Tau 1 Reading books at home – Tau 1
- Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 1
- Practising sounds and letters – Tau 1
- Reading books at home – Tau 1
- Tau 2 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa

- Tau 8 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
- Pāngarau – Tau 1 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mutunga o te Tau 1 ki te kura. Find out more
Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mutunga o te Tau 1 ki te kura.
- Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 1 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i Te Reo Rangatira i ngā Tau 1 ki te kura. Find out more
